Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are immediately preceded by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that occur in cases where SW-Reviewer Declined appears at least once
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in the most common process variant
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers relative to the total number of activities in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are repeated more than three times in the same case
Metric: the average of the function base > 3 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers occurring after SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that directly precede SW-Reviewer Agreed without any intervening reminder or deadline activity
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants containing Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers per case on average in submissions that undergo major revision
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that eventually lead to at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Ratio of SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Agreed across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers out of all reviewer assignment-related activities (including RW-AE Assign Reviewers and RSW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'RW-AE Assign Reviewers' or activity == 'RSW-AE Assign Reviewers'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are followed within 7 days by any reviewer response activity (SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer Declined' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer No Response'"}"

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that appear after a Reviewer Invitation Reminder
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' or activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'"}"

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in cases that end with SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit compared to those ending with SW-EIC Accept
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit' or activity == 'SW-EIC Accept'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that occur before any plagiarism-related activity versus after
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' or activity == 'Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are part of cycles involving Unassign Editor or Assign a Different Editor
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'Unassign Editor' or activity == 'Assign a Different Editor'"}"

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in the initial phase of the process (before first reviewer response) versus re-assignment phases
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer Declined' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer No Response'"}"
